GENERIC INJECTION

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "5700000000",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne mémorisée": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Panne présente": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Status DTC": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Status DTC Global": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "1200041000",
    "name": "ReadFreezeFrame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  }
]
